page_title: Pachinko Winning Guide COMPLETE FILE CR Evangelion 7
text:
is a guidebook for CR Evangelion 7 pachinko machine by Pachinko Hissho Guide Editorial Department. It was published by Byakuya Shobō on 20 February 2012. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4861918766
